# Let's open the provided file and print its content and repr to ensure exact characters and indices.
path = "/mnt/data/file-3pFVRN4N1VuNT2MXWQFYMR-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw_text = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
print("----- RAW TEXT START -----")
print(raw_text)
print("----- RAW TEXT END -----")
print("\n--- Repr ---\n")
print(repr(raw_text)[:1000])

text = raw_text
# find all indices of double quote character
quote_indices = [i for i, c in enumerate(text) if c == '"']
quote_indices, len(quote_indices)

pairs = []
for i in range(0, len(quote_indices), 2):
    start_q = quote_indices[i]
    end_q = quote_indices[i+1] if i+1 < len(quote_indices) else None
    pairs.append((start_q, end_q, text[start_q+1:end_q] if end_q else None))
pairs

# display the content of the 3rd quote (pair index 2)
pairs[2][2]

# Let's find double quote segments and their raw start and end indices (content only excluding quotes)
candidates = []
for start_q, end_q, content in pairs:
    # content begins at start_q+1, ends at end_q (exclusive) as index
    content_start = start_q + 1
    content_end = end_q
    # trim edges according to rules (whitespace, newlines, tabs, RTL controls, quotes «»"' and brackets ()[]{} <> and punctuation ، ؛ : . , ! ? … and tatweel ـ)
    trim_chars = set(['\n','\r','\t',' ', '\u200F', '\u200E', '"', "'", "«", "»", "(", ")", "[", "]", "{", "}", "<", ">", '،','؛',':','.','.',',','!','?','…','ـ'])
    s = text
    # trim left
    a = content_start
    b = content_end
    while a < b and s[a] in trim_chars:
        a += 1
    while b > a and s[b-1] in trim_chars:
        b -= 1
    cleaned = s[a:b]
    candidates.append((a,b, cleaned))
candidates

quote2_start, quote2_end = candidates[1][0], candidates[1][1]
quote2_text = text[quote2_start:quote2_end]
quote2_text, quote2_start, quote2_end, len(quote2_text)

s = quote2_text
s.find('شَهِيدًا'), s.find('شَهِيدٌ')

quote3_start, quote3_end = candidates[2][0], candidates[2][1]
q3 = text[quote3_start:quote3_end]
q3[:200]

pieces = q3.split(' * ')
pieces, len(pieces)

segments = []
offset = quote3_start
for piece in pieces:
    idx_in_q3 = q3.find(piece)
    if idx_in_q3 == -1:
        print("not found", piece)
    seg_start = quote3_start + idx_in_q3
    seg_end = seg_start + len(piece)
    segments.append((seg_start, seg_end, text[seg_start:seg_end]))
segments

big_quote_start, big_quote_end = candidates[4][0], candidates[4][1]
big_quote = text[big_quote_start:big_quote_end]
big_quote[:400]

start_in_big = big_quote.find('لَقَدْ')
start_in_big, big_quote[start_in_big:start_in_big+200]

bracket_index_in_big = big_quote.find('[')
bracket_index_in_big

ayah_span_start = big_quote_start + start_in_big
ayah_span_end = big_quote_start + bracket_index_in_big
ayah_text = text[ayah_span_start:ayah_span_end]
ayah_span_start, ayah_span_end, ayah_text[:200]

print(ayah_text)
print(len(ayah_text))

for m in re.finditer('يا عيسى', text):
    print(m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start()-40:m.start()+120])

s = text
# quote2 indices computed earlier
q2_start, q2_end = candidates[1][0], candidates[1][1]
s_q2 = s[q2_start:q2_end]
idx_shahida = s_q2.find('شَهِيدًا')
idx_shahidun = s_q2.rfind('شَهِيدٌ')
idx_shahida, idx_shahidun, s_q2[idx_shahida:idx_shahida+len('شَهِيدًا')], s_q2[idx_shahidun:idx_shahidun+len('شَهِيدٌ')]
len('شَهِيدًا')
s_q2.find('مَا دُمْتُ'), s_q2.find('مَا دُمْتُ فِيهِمْ'), s_q2[291:
s_q2.find('مَا دُمْتُ'), s_q2.find('مَا دُمْتُ فِيهِمْ')
len('شَهِيدٌ')

i = 2050
print(text[2000:2120])
print("----")
# Find 'يا عيسى بن مريم' occurrence 
occurrences = []
for m in re.finditer('يا عيسى بن مريم', text):
    occurrences.append((m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start():m.start()+90]))
occurrences[:10]

positions = []
for m in re.finditer('أأنت', text):
    start = m.start()
    # find next '?' after start
    qmark = text.find('?', start, start+200)  # search up to 200 chars ahead
    print(start, qmark, text[start:qmark+1])

for m in re.finditer('أأنت', text):
    start = m.start()
    qmark = text.find('؟', start, start+200)
    print(start, qmark, repr(text[start:qmark+1]) if qmark!=-1 else "no question mark found")

m = re.search('صَيِّروني', text)
m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start()-30:m.start()+80]

qmark = text.find('؟', 2103, 2160)
qmark, text[2103:qmark+1]

# Let's assemble initial candidate spans (absolute indices) as per plan
initial_candidates = [
    (64,143),  # initial quoted target
    (176,291), # Jesus verse 1
    (292,405), # Jesus verse 2
    (634,729),
    (732,846),
    (849,993),
    (996,1133),
    (1136,1242),
    # parenthesis occurrences for target and wadh? We'll include 2229..2312, 2346..2472, 3077..3157, 3822..3948
    (2229,2312),
    (2346,2472),
    (3077,3157),
    (3822,3948),
    # big "lqad kafara" ayah (3452..3663 trimmed maybe)
    (3452,3664),  # we will trim trailing space
    # paraphrases
    (1788,1851),  # 1788..1850 inclusive? We'll set end to 1851 to include '?', we'll trim.
    (2103,2140),  # include question mark, trim later
    (4223,4271),  # include ;
]

# Create trimming function and apply
trim_chars = set(['\n','\r','\t',' ', '\u200F', '\u200E', '\u200C', '\u200D', '"', "'", "«", "»", "(", ")", "[", "]", "{", "}", "<", ">", '،','؛',':','.','!','?','…','ـ'])

def trim_span(s, start, end):
    a, b = start, end
    # trim left
    while a < b and s[a] in trim_chars:
        a += 1
    # trim right
    while b > a and s[b-1] in trim_chars:
        b -= 1
    # sometimes may need to slide window by at most 2 chars inward to remove stray quotes/newlines
    # We'll attempt sliding by up to 2 chars if mismatch later, but here initial trimming is done.
    return a,b, s[a:b]

final_spans = []
for start,end in initial_candidates:
    a,b,subs = trim_span(text, start, end)
    # verify substring length >= 1 and contains Arabic letters (loosely)
    final_spans.append((a,b,subs))

# print and check duplicates and overlaps
for sp in final_spans:
    a,b,subs = sp
    print(a,b, len(subs), repr(subs)[:120])

# update trim_chars to include Arabic question mark
trim_chars = set(['\n','\r','\t',' ', '\u200F', '\u200E', '\u200C', '\u200D', '"', "'", "«", "»", "(", ")", "[", "]", "{", "}", "<", ">", '،','؛',':','.','!','?','؟','…','ـ'])
def trim_span2(s, start, end):
    a, b = start, end
    while a < b and s[a] in trim_chars:
        a += 1
    while b > a and s[b-1] in trim_chars:
        b -= 1
    # micro shift: if substring doesn't match due to stray quotes or newlines, allow shifting inward by at most 2 characters (rule 2)
    return a,b,s[a:b]

final_spans2 = []
for start,end in initial_candidates:
    a,b,subs = trim_span2(text, start, end)
    final_spans2.append((a,b,subs))

for sp in final_spans2:
    a,b,subs = sp
    print(a,b, len(subs), repr(subs)[:260])
